preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from clinlims.test_section where name = 'Cytology';

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (select id from localization where description = 'cytology test section' and english = 'Cytology' limit 1)

changeSet.author: mozzymutesa

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Cytopathologist'

changeSet.comment: Create Cytopathologist Role and permission for pages

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM system_role WHERE name = 'Global Roles')

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from clinlims.dictionary_category where description = 'Cytology Specimen Adequacy - Satisfactory';

changeSet.author: mozzymutesa
changeSet.comment: add columns to the cytology_sample table

changeSet.author: mozzymutesa

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from clinlims.dictionary_category where name = 'cytology_epithelial_cell_abnomalit_squamous';

changeSet.comment: adds Cytology Diagnosis Results in dictionary_category

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'CYTOLOGY_SPECIMEN_ADEQUACY'

changeSet.author: openelis

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary d JOIN clinlims.dictionary_category dc ON d.dictionary_category_id = dc.id WHERE dc.name = 'CYTOLOGY_SPECIMEN_ADEQUACY' AND d.local_abbrev = 'SATISFACTORY'

changeSet.comment: Insert Bethesda System dictionary entries - Part 1 (Specimen Assessment)

changeSet.author: openelis

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary d JOIN clinlims.dictionary_category dc ON d.dictionary_category_id = dc.id WHERE dc.name = 'CYTOLOGY_GENERAL_CATEGORY' AND d.local_abbrev = 'NILM'

changeSet.comment: Insert Bethesda System dictionary entries - Part 2 (Clinical Classifications)

column.name: dict_entry
column.value: Negative for intraepithelial lesion or malignancy

column.name: dict_entry
column.value: Shift in flora suggestive of bacterial vaginosis

column.name: dict_entry
column.value: Cellular changes consistent with herpes simplex virus

changeSet.author: openelis

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary d JOIN clinlims.dictionary_category dc ON d.dictionary_category_id = dc.id WHERE dc.name = 'CYTOLOGY_SQUAMOUS_ABNORMALITY' AND d.local_abbrev = 'ASC_US'

changeSet.comment: Insert Bethesda System dictionary entries - Part 3 (Epithelial Abnormalities)

column.name: dict_entry
column.value: Atypical squamous cells of undetermined significance

column.name: dict_entry
column.value: Atypical squamous cells cannot exclude HSIL

column.name: dict_entry
column.value: HSIL with features suspicious for invasion

column.name: dict_entry
column.value: Atypical glandular cells - not otherwise specified

changeSet.author: openelis

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary d JOIN clinlims.dictionary_category dc ON d.dictionary_category_id = dc.id WHERE dc.name = 'CYTOLOGY_HPV_RESULT' AND d.local_abbrev = 'HPV_POSITIVE'

changeSet.comment: Insert Bethesda System dictionary entries - Part 4 (HPV Testing and Clinical Management)
